subject: Upgrade to the iPhone 15 Pro, James!
body:
Hi James,

As a valued premium subscriber with us for over 3 years, we appreciate your loyalty! We noticed that you’re currently using the iPhone 12 and regularly enjoy a data usage of 45GB per month on your plan.

We’re excited to offer you an upgrade to the new iPhone 15 Pro for just £55 a month. This device features the powerful A17 Pro chip, a stunning 48MP main camera with 3x optical zoom, and a ProMotion 120Hz always-on display. Plus, with its titanium build and all-day battery life, it’s designed to enhance your mobile experience.

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to elevate your device and enjoy the ultimate iPhone experience!

Ready to upgrade? Click here to get started today!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team
